title: gate-protocol.md still uses ADVISORY verdict instead of ASK
description: The gate file template in gate-protocol.md lines 35 and 40 still show 'PASS | ADVISORY | BLOCKING' instead of 'PASS | ASK | BLOCKING'. This file was not in any stream's file_ownership during implementation, but it defines the canonical template that all gate files reference. Any agent following the template literally would use the old verdict type.

title: gate-protocol.md missing Resolved Asks section in template
description: Spec 00 Contract 1 defines a '## Resolved Asks' section for gate files when ASK verdicts occur. The step-transition.md correctly documents this section (lines 154-174), but the canonical gate file template in gate-protocol.md does not include it. The template should show where the Resolved Asks section goes in the file structure.

title: Feature doc status not updated from Spec to Review
description: docs/feature/workflow-phase-redesign.md line 3 shows 'Status: Spec' but implementation is complete and we are in the review step. The status should reflect the current state. Additionally, the work items checklist (lines 59-67) is entirely unchecked despite all 8 beads items being closed, and the Implementation Notes section (lines 70-71) is still empty.

title: work-harness.md command list missing /work-research
description: work-harness.md line 16 lists work commands as '/work, /work-fix, /work-feature, /work-deep' but omits the new '/work-research' command added in this initiative. The activation trigger list should include all work commands.

title: work-harness.md tier field description excludes Tier R
description: work-harness.md line 63 documents the tier field as '1, 2, or 3' but should include 'R' since Tier R was added. The authoritative state-conventions.md correctly includes 'R' but the parent skill summary is inconsistent.

title: gate-protocol.md still uses ADVISORY verdict instead of ASK
description: Fixed: replaced ADVISORY with ASK on lines 35 and 40, updated per-item label on line 42.
resolution: Replaced ADVISORY with ASK in verdict template lines 35, 40. Updated 'pass/advisory/blocking' to 'pass/ask/blocking' on line 42.

title: gate-protocol.md missing Resolved Asks section in template
description: Fixed: added Resolved Asks section to gate file template between Review Results and Advisory Notes.
resolution: Added ## Resolved Asks section with Phase A/B subsections and HTML comment noting omission rule. Updated required sections description.

title: Feature doc status not updated from Spec to Review
description: Fixed: updated status to Review, checked all work items, populated Implementation Notes.
resolution: Status Spec→Review, all 9 work items checked, Implementation Notes populated with summary.

title: work-harness.md command list missing /work-research
description: Fixed: added /work-research to activation trigger command list.
resolution: Added /work-research to the command list on line 16.

title: work-harness.md tier field description excludes Tier R
description: Fixed: updated tier field docs to include R.
resolution: Updated tier field description from '1, 2, or 3' to '1, 2, 3, or R'.
